name: Connect to Your Clients’ Socials with a White-Labeled Shareable Link
body_para:
How are you managing your clients’ socials? If you’re like most agencies, you might have a spreadsheet with everyone’s passwords. We thought there should be a better solution - one that doesn’t require you to manage logins at all. Enter: shareable connect. Instead of logging into your clients’ accounts (or giving them access to your social media management platform), create a shareable link for them to connect their accounts directly to Synup Social. Plus, it’s white-labeled!
‍

Here’s the run-down:

  1. Create a shareable link for your clients
  2. Your clients connect their social media accounts using the link
  3. Once connected, you can manage their accounts from Synup Social!

*So* much simpler than juggling passwords on a spreadsheet, right?

Connect your clients’ socials directly to the Synup Social platform with a shareable link


Shareable connect makes life easier for everyone. Your clients will appreciate not having to share their logins with you (or make you an admin for their Facebook page), and you can stop keeping everyone’s passwords on a disorganized spreadsheet. Connecting only takes a few minutes, so things are hassle-free for your clients!

Start by taking a look at your connected accounts for a given brand. Then, you can click “Client connect” to generate a unique link to send to your clients.

‍

‍

Just copy the URL or email it to your client directly. 

‍

This is what it looks like from your clients’ POV:

‍

From here, they can use our direct integrations to connect their brand’s social media accounts. After that, you’ll be able to manage their account, create posts, view analytics, and more!

Shareable connect takes the hassle out of connecting to your clients’ social media accounts


Connecting social media accounts to Synup Social without the need for clients' passwords will change the way you do business. Here are just some of the benefits:

  • Enhanced security: With a password-free connection, clients no longer need to share their social media account passwords with you. This reduces the risk of password breaches, phishing attacks, or unauthorized access - and should neutralize any privacy concerns. Clients won’t have to worry about giving you their passwords, because they won’t need to!
    ‍
  • Save time: By eliminating the need for clients to share their passwords with you, you skip the pointless back-and-forth. Just send them a link and have them log in! Clients can seamlessly link their social media accounts with just a few clicks, streamlining the onboarding process and reducing friction.
    ‍
  • Shareable connect is user-friendly: Connecting socials is intuitive for you and your clients. The simplicity enhances user satisfaction and reduces any frustrations from juggling passwords.
    ‍
  • Seamless multi-account connection: You can have clients connect their Facebook, Instagram, Pinterest, LinkedIn, and Twitter accounts using shareable connect. And now, you can effortlessly connect and manage all their accounts with just one link. It won’t take them more than 5 minutes!
    ‍
  • Build trust and goodwill: Your clients will love the ease and security of shareable connect. With a simple, painless process, they’ll appreciate that you value their time and the security of their accounts!

‍

Having clients connect their social media accounts directly to Synup Social makes things simpler for everyone. You can cut down on time chasing clients for their login info, and they can feel secure knowing their passwords aren’t floating around on some spreadsheet. 

Book a Demo and Experience Synup Social to see how shareable connect revolutionizes your work with clients! It’s time to give those spreadsheets a rest.
use_case_summary: Easily manage your clients' social media accounts without passwords using white-labeled shareable links. Connect their accounts directly to Synup Social, enhancing security and saving time.

seo.title: Connect to Your Clients' Socials Easily with White-Labeled Shareable Links | Synup Social
seo.description: Simplify social media management for your agency by using white-labeled shareable links. Connect your clients' social media accounts directly to Synup Social, eliminating the need for passwords.
